# AI Platform Roadmap

## Search Infrastructure

Vector search infrastructure rollout.

Search latency improved significantly.

New indexing pipeline deployed.

## Retrieval Systems

Hybrid retrieval implementation.

Semantic search quality improved.

Knowledge base coverage expanded.

## Deployment Roadmap

Cross encoder deployment planned.

Enterprise RAG platform launch Q3.

Agentic workflows under evaluation.

Component | Status
Vector Search | Production
Hybrid Retrieval | Testing
Cross Encoder | Planned

# Annual Financial Report 2026

## Revenue Performance

Revenue reached $5.2 billion.

Revenue increased across all regions.

Subscription services contributed strongly.

## Profitability

Operating margin improved to 18%.

Cost optimization reduced expenses.

Free cash flow reached record levels.

## Cloud Division

Cloud division grew by 35%.

AI products generated record profits.

Enterprise customers expanded usage.

Region | Revenue
US | 2.1B
Europe | 1.7B
Asia | 1.4B

# Employee Benefits 2026

## Health Insurance

Health insurance coverage increased by 12%.

The company expanded hospitalization benefits.

Employees can now add dependents at reduced rates.

## Dental Benefits

Dental insurance remains unchanged.

Preventive dental checkups remain fully covered.

Orthodontic coverage was extended for children.

## Remote Work Policy

Remote work allowance increased.

Employees may claim internet reimbursement.

Work-from-home equipment support continues.

Benefit | Coverage
Health Insurance | 12% Increase
Dental Insurance | No Change
Remote Work Allowance | Increased
